zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon Fraser於1125年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安時，他的父親Gilbert Fraser27歲，母親Margaret Alpin23歲。他於1147年之前與Margaret Caithness在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1160年住在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安。他去世於1190年在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安享年65歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon Fraser于1125年出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安时，他的父亲Gilbert Fraser27岁，母亲Margaret Alpin23岁。他于1147年之前与Margaret Caithness在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1160年住在苏格兰米德洛迪安。他去世于1190年在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安享年65岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

en.Humbie, East Lothian, Scotland, United K: Humbie, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom

nameMeanings.name: Fraser
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: apparently a nickname from Anglo-Norman French fraser(e), fresere ‘strawberry plant’. Fresel and Frisel, from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, are early variants of the Fraser surname, the modern Gaelicized form of which is Friseal. See Frizzell . The crest on the Scottish family's coat of arms takes the form of a strawberry plant, but its antiquity is unknown. Claims of a habitational derivation, in particular from a place called la Frézelière in Anjou (France), are attractive but they lack verifiable evidence.
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

History: There are two clans Fraser in Scotland, with common ancestry going back to Simon Fraser of Keith in East Lothian, who lived in the 12th century. One of these clans has its seat at Philorth Castle (subsequently re-named Cairnbulg) on the northeast coast of Scotland. Sir Alexander Fraser, 8th laird of Philorth (c. 1536–1623) converted the fishing village of Faithlie into the burgh of Fraserburgh in the 1590s. The other clan is Fraser of Lovat, associated mainly with the city of Inverness are. They are descended from Simon Fraser, a younger son, who lived in the early 14th century. In Gaelic, the head of Clan Fraser of Lovat is known as Mac Shimi ‘son of Simon’.

variants.name: Frayser
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frazer
meanings: Variant of   Fraser  , associated chiefly with northern Ireland.

variants.name: Frashier
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frizzell
meanings: English and Irish: nickname from Old French fresel, frisel ‘lace, ribbon, braid, brooch, frill, ruff’, for someone with an ornate style of dress, or ‘object of little value’ (a diminutive of frese, of ancient Germanic origin).
Scottish: from Anglo-Norman French fresel ‘strawberry’, an alternative form of Fraser .

variants.name: Frazier
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Fraser  .

variants.name: Frasher
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Fraser  .
Possibly an altered form of German Fratzscher (see Frutchey ).

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon Fraser was born in 1125, in East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Gilbert Fraser, was 27 and his mother, Margaret Alpin, was 23. He married Margaret Caithness before 1147, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He lived in Midlothian, Scotland in 1160. He died in 1190, in East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon Fraser est né en 1125, à East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert Fraser, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret Alpin, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Caithness avant 1147, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Midlothian, Écosse en 1160. Il est décédé en 1190, à East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.Humbie, East Lothian, Scotland, United K: Humbie, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Simon Fraser 1125 in East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert Fraser 27 und seine Mutter Margaret Alpin 23. Er hat vor 1147 in Scotland Margaret Caithness geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1160 hat er in Midlothian, Scotland gelebt. Er starb 1190 im Alter von 65 Jahren in East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon Fraserが1125年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンで生まれた時，父Gilbert Fraserは27歳，母Margaret Alpinは23歳であった。1147年以前にスコットランドでMargaret Caithnessと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1160年にはスコットランドミドロスアンに住んでいた。彼は1190年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンで65歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Fraser(이)가 1125년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Fraser(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Alpin(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1147년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Margaret Caithness(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1160년도에 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 살았다. 그는 1190년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon Fraser родился в 1125 г. в местности эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gilbert Fraser было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Alpin, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Caithness перед 1147 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности мидлотян, Шотландия в 1160 году. Он умер в 1190 г. в местности эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.
